Mecklenburg & Union County · Charlotte NC metro area

Hospital & Nursing Home Notary Service Area — Charlotte, NC

Integrity Closings CLT travels to hospitals, nursing homes, assisted living, and rehabilitation centers throughout the Charlotte metro area and surrounding communities. If your loved one is in a facility nearby, we can get there.

Serving Mecklenburg County, Union County, and nearby communities across the greater Charlotte region.

Call for Availability Near You Request a Same-Day Visit
Charlotte & Mint Hill
Monroe & Union County
Matthews, Indian Trail & more
Communities We Serve

Cities & Communities in Our Service Area

We travel throughout Mecklenburg and Union Counties — and to nearby communities beyond. If your loved one's facility isn't listed, call us. We'll let you know if we can reach them.

Primary

Charlotte, NC

All areas of Charlotte including Uptown, South End, Myers Park, Ballantyne, University City, NoDa, and surrounding neighborhoods. We serve all major hospital systems and nursing facilities throughout the city.

Primary

Mint Hill, NC

Mint Hill facilities and private residences. We regularly serve this community and can often accommodate same-day requests.

Primary

Monroe, NC

The Union County seat and surrounding Monroe area. Nursing homes, assisted living facilities, and hospital visits throughout Monroe and nearby communities.

Mecklenburg County

Matthews, NC

Assisted living, rehab centers, and private homes in Matthews and the southeastern Charlotte suburbs.

Union County

Indian Trail, NC

A fast-growing Union County community — we serve care facilities and residents throughout Indian Trail.

Union County

Waxhaw, NC

Care facilities and private residences in Waxhaw and surrounding Union County communities south of Charlotte.

Union County

Weddington & Stallings, NC

Smaller communities in Union County that we serve regularly for both facility and in-home visits.

Mecklenburg County

Pineville & Steele Creek, NC

South Charlotte communities including Pineville and the Steele Creek corridor. Assisted living and hospital visits available.

Extended Area

Not Sure? Just Call.

If your facility is near the Charlotte metro area and not listed here, call 980-372-4103. We'll confirm whether we can make it work.

Serving Mecklenburg & Union Counties — and Beyond

Our primary coverage is Mecklenburg County (Charlotte, Mint Hill, Matthews, Pineville, Huntersville, Cornelius) and Union County (Monroe, Indian Trail, Waxhaw, Weddington, Stallings, Marvin). For facilities outside these counties, call and we'll do our best to accommodate your situation.

Where We Go

Hospital Systems & Facility Types We Serve

We are familiar with Charlotte's major hospital campuses and can work with any nursing home or long-term care facility that permits visitor access.

🏥

Atrium Health Campuses

Carolinas Medical Center, Mercy, Union, Pineville, and other Atrium Health locations throughout the Charlotte region.

🏥

Novant Health Facilities

Presbyterian Medical Center, Huntersville, Matthews, Mint Hill, and other Novant locations in the metro area.

🏡

Nursing Homes & Long-Term Care

Any licensed nursing facility in our service area. We coordinate with staff and follow facility visitor protocols.

🌿

Assisted Living Facilities

Independent and semi-independent assisted living communities throughout the Charlotte metro and Union County.

🔄

Rehabilitation Centers

Short-term rehab after surgery or illness. Documents often can't wait for discharge — we come to you.

🏠

Private Homes (In-Home Care)

For seniors receiving care at home who cannot travel. We come to the residence — anywhere in our service area.

FAQ

Questions About Our Service Area

Do you travel to all hospitals in the Charlotte area?
Yes. We travel to all major hospital campuses in the Charlotte area including Atrium Health and Novant Health locations. We follow each hospital's visitor sign-in and access procedures. Let us know the hospital name and floor when you call and we'll coordinate accordingly.
I'm in Monroe — can you come to a nursing home there?
Yes. Monroe and Union County are part of our regular service area. Call 980-372-4103 to confirm availability and schedule your visit.
My parent is at a nursing home in Mint Hill. Can you help?
Absolutely. Mint Hill is a primary service area for us. We travel to nursing homes, assisted living, and rehab centers in Mint Hill regularly. Same-day visits are available when our schedule allows.
What if the facility is outside Charlotte — will you still come?
Call us at 980-372-4103 and give us the facility's address. For facilities in and around Mecklenburg and Union Counties, we can almost always make it work. For locations further out, we'll be honest about whether it's feasible for the timeline you need.
Do you serve all areas of Charlotte, including the north and south sides?
Yes — all of Charlotte is in our service area. Whether the facility is in Ballantyne in the south, University City in the north, Steele Creek to the southwest, or anywhere in between, we travel throughout the city.
Can you come on weekends or evenings?
Call us directly to discuss your situation. We understand that medical situations don't follow business hours, and we do our best to accommodate families with urgent needs outside of standard weekday times. Availability varies — the fastest way to know is to call 980-372-4103.
Get in Touch

Tell us where your loved one is and what you need notarized. We'll confirm availability and get your visit scheduled quickly.

© Integrity Closings CLT · Frank Lamon Coxx, Notary Public · Charlotte, NC

Disclaimer: Integrity Closings CLT provides mobile notary services only and does not provide legal advice. Notarization requires the signer to be mentally aware, willing, and in possession of valid government-issued photo ID. Completion is subject to the notary's professional judgment.
